goal: Open Chrome and search for Gemini Live Agent Challenge

steps.description: Type 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' into the address bar or search bar within the Chrome browser.
steps.expected_result: The text 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' is visible in the Chrome address bar or search field.
A Google search results page for 'Gemini Live Agent Challenge' is displayed in the Chrome browser.

correction_history.reason: Initial attempt failed: The Google Chrome browser did not open. The screen after the action remains identical to the before state, showing the desktop and the PowerShell window, with no Chrome browser visible.

Tier-1 failed — tried alternative: The Google Chrome browser did not open. The 'AFTER' screenshot shows the desktop and the PowerShell window, which are visually identical to the 'BEFORE' screenshot in terms of the desktop applications present and active. The expected new Chrome browser window is not visible in either screenshot.

Tier-2 failed — required user assist: The Google Chrome browser was already open in the BEFORE screenshot. In the AFTER screenshot, the content within the Google Chrome browser changed from a blank new tab/search bar to displaying a search query ('colby college transfer application - Google Search') and a dropdown of search suggestions. This indicates an interaction within the browser, not the browser opening.
